TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Keguy/ Kri/ Krig = Ririh so peeyah gamil hmeru ka keguy nii. Waso keguy ge mgsama ka rabu na, rudan de, mgceyas hari, ciwin ma mtumu hnyegan waso na ma hreyan egu uban runge ka toma waso na duri. Hmeru niqan cbuwan hido ma dheran mhhuriq hari ka keguy nii, mangal bunga na prana mhuma. Bobo na dehuk idas 2-3 phmaan daha, kkkawas kingal ge mnteru ma sepac ka sqitun daha, kiya ka meyah mssbarux smtuku qmetuy keguy kana ka seediq alang. Mqedil ge mangal gesak, skgigan daha smkeguy han, mhedu smkeguy de, phdagun na dungal ma, pdaung daha muqah, tmgiya, dmaus betaq rmebu rako na ware nii, kiya kesun daha ware nuqah ka nii. Ngalan daha egu ooda ka ita Seediq nii duri, so mqedil de, stinun daha lukus ma pala, rseno ge, slmeun daha qqeya ddesun lmiqu, so ka snuyuk, snuyuk tlenga, tokan bale, wahul ma kadi qcurux‚Ä¶knii.
S.PHON: = k…ôguj/ k…ĺi/ k…ĺig = …ĺi…ĺińß so p…ô…ôańß gamil ńßm…ô…ĺu ka k…ôguj nii. waso k…ôguj g…ô mgsama ka …ĺabu na, …ĺudan d…ô, mg ¶…ôas ńßa…ĺi, ¶iwin ma mtumu ńßnj…ôgan waso na ma ńß…ĺ…ôan …ôgu uban …ĺuŇč…ô ka toma waso na du…ĺi. ńßm…ô…ĺu niqan ¶buwan ńßido ma dńß…ô…ĺan mńßńßu…ĺiq ńßa…ĺi ka k…ôguj nii, maŇčal buŇča na p…ĺana mńßuma. bobo na d…ôńßuk idas *-* pńßmaan dańßa, kkkawas kiŇčal g…ô mnt…ô…ĺu ma s…ôpa ¶ ka sqitun dańßa, kija ka m…ôańß mssba…ĺux smtuku qm…ôtuj k…ôguj kana ka s…ô…ôdiq alaŇč. mq…ôdil g…ô maŇčal g…ôsak, skgigan dańßa smk…ôguj ńßan, mńß…ôdu smk…ôguj d…ô, pńßdagun na duŇčal ma, pdauŇč dańßa muqańß, tmgija, dmaus b…ôtaq …ĺm…ôbu …ĺako na wa…ĺ…ô nii, kija k…ôsun dańßa wa…ĺ…ô nuqańß ka nii. Ňčalan dańßa …ôgu ooda ka ita s…ô…ôdiq nii du…ĺi, so mq…ôdil d…ô, stinun dańßa lukus ma pala, …ĺs…ôno g…ô, slm…ôun dańßa qq…ôa dd…ôsun lmiqu, so ka snujuk, snujuk tl…ôŇča, tokan bal…ô, wańßul ma kadi q ¶u…ĺux*knii.
S.FORM: = Keguy/ Kri/ Krig = Ririh so peeyah gamil hmeru ka keguy nii. Waso keguy ge mgsama ka rabu na, rudan de, mgceyas hari, ciwin ma mtumu hnyegan waso na ma hreyan egu uban runge ka toma waso na duri. Hmeru niqan cbuwan hido ma dheran mhhuriq hari ka keguy nii, mangal bunga na prana mhuma. Bobo na dehuk idas 2-3 phmaan daha, kkkawas kingal ge mnteru ma sepac ka sqitun daha, kiya ka meyah mssbarux smtuku qmetuy keguy kana ka seediq alang. Mqedil ge mangal gesak, skgigan daha smkeguy han, mhedu smkeguy de, phdagun na dungal ma, pdaung daha muqah, tmgiya, dmaus betaq rmebu rako na ware nii, kiya kesun daha ware nuqah ka nii. Ngalan daha egu ooda ka ita Seediq nii duri, so mqedil de, stinun daha lukus ma pala, rseno ge, slmeun daha qqeya ddesun lmiqu, so ka snuyuk, snuyuk tlenga, tokan bale, wahul ma kadi qcurux‚Ä¶knii.
S.PHON: = k…ôguj/ k…ĺi/ k…ĺig = …ĺi…ĺińß so p…ô…ôańß gamil ńßm…ô…ĺu ka k…ôguj nii. waso k…ôguj g…ô mgsama ka …ĺabu na, …ĺudan d…ô, mg ¶…ôas ńßa…ĺi, ¶iwin ma mtumu ńßnj…ôgan waso na ma ńß…ĺ…ôan …ôgu uban …ĺuŇč…ô ka toma waso na du…ĺi. ńßm…ô…ĺu niqan ¶buwan ńßido ma dńß…ô…ĺan mńßńßu…ĺiq ńßa…ĺi ka k…ôguj nii, maŇčal buŇča na p…ĺana mńßuma. bobo na d…ôńßuk idas *-* pńßmaan dańßa, kkkawas kiŇčal g…ô mnt…ô…ĺu ma s…ôpa ¶ ka sqitun dańßa, kija ka m…ôańß mssba…ĺux smtuku qm…ôtuj k…ôguj kana ka s…ô…ôdiq alaŇč. mq…ôdil g…ô maŇčal g…ôsak, skgigan dańßa smk…ôguj ńßan, mńß…ôdu smk…ôguj d…ô, pńßdagun na duŇčal ma, pdauŇč dańßa muqańß, tmgija, dmaus b…ôtaq …ĺm…ôbu …ĺako na wa…ĺ…ô nii, kija k…ôsun dańßa wa…ĺ…ô nuqańß ka nii. Ňčalan dańßa …ôgu ooda ka ita s…ô…ôdiq nii du…ĺi, so mq…ôdil d…ô, stinun dańßa lukus ma pala, …ĺs…ôno g…ô, slm…ôun dańßa qq…ôa dd…ôsun lmiqu, so ka snujuk, snujuk tl…ôŇča, tokan bal…ô, wańßul ma kadi q ¶u…ĺux*knii.
